change: Added Williams %R(14) < -80 alongside existing Market cap > $2B and RSI(14) < 30, requiring two independent oversold signals to agree. Reduced matches 36->32. Does not fix the CRWD-style false positive (short-term dip inside an uptrend still clears both oscillators) - step 2's 52-week-high distance check remains mandatory for that. Stochastic Oscillator filter attempted and abandoned - scanner backend has a template bug on FILTER_TYPE_STOCHASTIC_OSCILLATOR regardless of parameters.

Tightened PEG<1.5->0.35, ROE>15%->25%, added Operating margin>0 and Net profit margin>0 (previously no profitability filter at all). Reduced matches 394->71. Direct application of the Quality Minus Junk profitability/quality logic (RUBRICS.md citation) enforced at the scan level instead of only in step 4's manual read.
